title: Door Knocker [Vanilla Edition]
description: This Mod Updates FroyoCS'S Mod From 1.18.1 To 1.20 While Still Being Completely Server-Side.
body:
![Modified villager home](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/buRCy5Db/images/6a496fc7019c315ffbda3dc36259a5365abf2ca4.png)
This Mod Updates [FroyoCS'S](https://github.com/froyo4u/Door-Knocker 'Title') Mod From 1.18.1 To 1.20 While Still Being Completely Server-Side.

This mod makes it so that when you hit a door or trapdoor, it plays the zombie attacking door sound.
